context.brief: Review a Korean fintech account settings flow before implementation handoff.

notes: The source is a synthetic benchmark fixture.
No browser session was available for this baseline report.

sources.observation: Static HTML fixture inspected without executing scripts or changing files.
The brief requires Korean fintech and implementation-handoff coverage.

lenses.summary: The page exposes one focused account-maintenance task.

evidence.observation: The main region contains one settings heading, one field, and one save action.

lenses.summary: Activation feedback cannot be confirmed from static HTML.

evidence.observation: The fixture defines a button but no runtime state or handler.

lenses.summary: No overlay, navigation, or spatial transition exists in the fixture.

evidence.observation: The fixture is a single static main region.

lenses.summary: Repeated submission and cancellation behavior require runtime evidence.

evidence.observation: Static markup cannot prove rapid-repeat or in-flight cancellation behavior.

lenses.summary: No motion implementation is present to inspect.

evidence.observation: The fixture has no stylesheet, animation, or transition.

lenses.summary: Static markup cannot establish responsiveness under realistic interaction or content.

evidence.observation: The fixture has no executable workload from which runtime responsiveness can be measured.

lenses.summary: The phone input has no programmatically associated label.

evidence.observation: Visible field text is a span and the input has no label, aria-label, or aria-labelledby.

lenses.summary: Viewport behavior and Korean label wrapping require browser evidence.

evidence.observation: A viewport meta tag exists, but static inspection cannot prove layout resilience.

findings.title: Associate the phone field label with its input
findings.before: The visible phone label is a span next to an unlabeled input.
findings.after: Use a label element whose for value matches the input id.
findings.why: Screen-reader users need a programmatic name for the field.

evidence.observation: No label association or accessible-name attribute is present.

verification: Inspect the accessibility tree and confirm the input name is 휴대폰 번호.
Tab to the field and confirm the visible focus indicator remains present.

findings.title: Record repeated-submit and cancellation behavior
findings.before: No runtime session was available, so in-flight behavior is unknown.
findings.after: Exercise the save action five times rapidly and attempt cancellation during the request.
findings.why: Static code cannot establish whether repeated input queues, locks, or preserves current state.

evidence.observation: The baseline explicitly records that no browser session was available.

verification: Run the approved browser verification profile against mobile and desktop viewports.
Record rapid-repeat, cancellation, keyboard, and reduced-motion observations.

summary.nextAction: Fix the accessible-name failure, then collect the missing runtime evidence.

requiredBefore: creating a commit or external handoff
